_comment: DO NOT EDIT: FILE GENERATED AUTOMATICALLY BY PTERODACTYL PANEL - PTERODACTYL.IO
name: HaikalDev Portfolio
author: me@haikaldev.my.id
description: Pterodactyl Egg for HaikalDev Portfolio (React/Vite Frontend + Express Backend) featuring automatic git pull, dependency checks, and production assets building.
startup:
if [ ! -f run.sh ]; then
    echo "[HaikalDev] run.sh tidak ditemukan. Menulis run.sh default..."
    cat << 'EOF' > run.sh
#!/bin/bash
set -e
echo "[HaikalDev] Starting HaikalDev Dual-Port Launcher..."
if [ -d "/home/container/node/bin" ]; then
    export PATH="/home/container/node/bin:$PATH"
fi
FRONTEND_PORT=${FRONTEND_PORT:-$SERVER_PORT}
BACKEND_PORT=${BACKEND_PORT:-3001}

# 1. Automatic Git Pull
if [ ! -d ".git" ]; then
    echo "[HaikalDev] Git repository not found. Cloning from ${GIT_REPO}..."
    git clone -b "${GIT_BRANCH:-master}" "${GIT_REPO}" .
else
    echo "[HaikalDev] Running git pull..."
    git pull origin "${GIT_BRANCH:-master}"
fi

# 2. Setup Frontend
if [ -f "package.json" ]; then
    if [ ! -d "node_modules" ]; then
        echo "[HaikalDev] Installing frontend node modules..."
        npm install --no-audit --no-fund
    fi
    CURRENT_API_BASE="${VITE_API_BASE}"
    CACHED_URL_FILE="/home/container/.cached_api_base"
    REBUILD=false
    if [ ! -d "dist" ]; then
        REBUILD=true
    elif [ -f "$CACHED_URL_FILE" ]; then
        CACHED_URL=$(cat "$CACHED_URL_FILE")
        if [ "$CURRENT_API_BASE" != "$CACHED_URL" ]; then
            REBUILD=true
        fi
    else
        REBUILD=true
    fi
    if [ "$REBUILD" = true ]; then
        export VITE_API_BASE="$CURRENT_API_BASE"
        echo "[HaikalDev] Rebuilding frontend assets..."
        npm run build
        echo "$CURRENT_API_BASE" > "$CACHED_URL_FILE"
    fi
fi

# 3. Setup Backend
if [ -d "backend" ]; then
    cd backend
    if [ ! -d "node_modules" ]; then
        echo "[HaikalDev] Installing backend node modules..."
        npm install --no-audit --no-fund
    fi
    cd /home/container
fi

cleanup() {
    kill "$BACKEND_PID" 2>/dev/null || true
    kill "$FRONTEND_PID" 2>/dev/null || true
    exit 0
}
trap cleanup SIGINT SIGTERM EXIT

# 4. Start Backend
cd /home/container/backend
export PORT="$BACKEND_PORT"
node src/server.js &
BACKEND_PID=$!

# 5. Start Frontend
if [ -d "/home/container/dist" ]; then
    cd /home/container
    npx vite preview --port "$FRONTEND_PORT" --host 0.0.0.0 &
    FRONTEND_PID=$!
else
    sleep infinity &
    FRONTEND_PID=$!
fi
wait -n "$BACKEND_PID" "$FRONTEND_PID"
EOF
fi
chmod +x run.sh && ./run.sh

installation.script:
#!/bin/ash

# =============================================================
# HaikalDev Portfolio -- Pterodactyl Installation Script
# Installs portable Node.js 20 into the server directory
# =============================================================

set -e
cd /mnt/user-data/volumes/$P_SERVER_UUID

echo "[HaikalDev] Memulai instalasi Node.js 20 portable..."

NODE_VER="v20.11.0"
NODE_DIR="node-${NODE_VER}-linux-x64"
NODE_TAR="${NODE_DIR}.tar.xz"

if [ ! -d "node" ]; then
    echo "[HaikalDev] Downloading Node.js ${NODE_VER}..."
    apk add --no-cache curl tar xz git
    curl -LsO "https://nodejs.org/dist/${NODE_VER}/${NODE_TAR}"
    echo "[HaikalDev] Extracting Node.js..."
    tar -xf "${NODE_TAR}"
    mv "${NODE_DIR}" node
    rm "${NODE_TAR}"
    echo "[HaikalDev] Node.js portable installed successfully in ./node"
else
    echo "[HaikalDev] Node.js portable already exists."
fi

echo "[HaikalDev] Setup completed!"

variables.name: Git Repository
variables.description: URL Repository GitHub untuk portofolio ini.

variables.name: Git Branch
variables.description: Branch target untuk proses Git Pull.

variables.name: Backend Port
variables.description: Port untuk Express API Server (harus di-allocate pada server).

variables.name: Vite Backend API Base
variables.description: URL Backend API (misal: http://IP_KAMU:3001/api). Digunakan oleh frontend saat build.
